---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the audit workflow or CLI
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap does this solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the change you want.

## Why it matters

Explain the benefit for verification, reproducibility, or maintainability.

## Extra context

Examples, sample tweets, or output snippets.
